title: agrostis scabra
intro: Agrostis scabra, also known as ticklegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis scabra include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural diuretic. Agrostis scabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
